creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ryo ONODERA from comment #0)

Hi Ryo,

Thanks for the patch. Unfortunately, it seems to fail to patch:

===>  Patching for minitube-3.4.2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for minitube-3.4.2 from /data/fernape_data/FreeBSD-repos/ports/head/multimedia/minitube/files
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to src/ytregions.cpp.rej
===>  FAILED Applying FreeBSD patch-src_ytregions.cpp
===> FAILED to apply cleanly FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-src_ytregions.cpp
*** Error code 1

Would you have a look at it?

Thanks!
